defaultMissionText: Bike from Union Square to McCarren Park and show the route's historical crash observations.
missionExamples: Bike from Union Square to McCarren Park and show the route's historical crash observations.
Walk from Washington Square Park to Union Square and inspect recorded crashes.
Bike from Cooper Park to McCarren Park using historical street observations.
Walk from Tompkins Square Park to Union Square and show recorded injuries.
Ride from McCarren Park to Cooper Park and inspect the historical observation score.
